title: apalanthe granatensis
side_effects: Apalanthe granatensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea, dizziness, and headaches in individuals who consume it in excess or without proper preparation. Prolonged use can also lead to liver damage and increased risk of bleeding due to its high content of toxic compounds. Some users may experience skin irritation, rashes, or allergic reactions after topical application, while others may experience digestive issues like diarrhea and stomach pain. In severe cases, improper use of Apalanthe granatensis can even lead to respiratory failure or cardiac arrest, highlighting the importance of careful handling and consultation with a medical professional.
